# TD Robotic Painting Systems (PaintCell)

> System-level integration of robotic spray painting cells and paint booth automation for automotive, industrial, appliance, and aerospace manufacturing.

## Company Overview

TD Robotic Painting Systems (brand: PaintCell) is a Shanghai-based engineering company specializing in the design, integration, and commissioning of robotic painting systems. Founded in 2000, the company serves 10+ industries worldwide with 500+ systems deployed across 30+ countries.

## Core Services

- **Robotic Painting System Integration**: Turnkey integration of industrial robots (ABB, Yaskawa, Kawasaki, FANUC), spray technology (electrostatic rotary bells, HVLP, airless), paint supply systems, booth automation, and PLC-based controls.
- **Paint Booth Automation**: Engineering of spray booth airflow, overspray management, safety interlocks, and process controls for new builds or retrofit installations.
- **Spray Robot Integration**: Selection, configuration, programming, and deployment of explosion-proof painting robots with hollow-wrist construction.
- **Turnkey Paint Shop Delivery**: Complete paint shop engineering from pre-treatment through topcoat, including conveyor systems, curing ovens, and quality inspection.

## Industries Served

- Automotive OEM (complete vehicle body painting, 200K+ units/year capacity)
- Automotive Tier-1 (bumpers, trim, mirrors, wheels)
- Metal Parts & General Industrial
- Construction & Heavy Equipment
- Appliance & Consumer Electronics
- Aerospace & Defense
- Plastics & Composites
- Battery & Energy Storage
- Medical Device Coating
- Furniture & Woodwork
- Hardware & Sanitary

## Key Technical Capabilities

- Multi-brand robot integration on unified Siemens S7-1500 PLC platform
- 20+ color fast change system (Sames PPH707, <3 min change, <150ml waste)
- Water-based paint temperature control (pipe-in-pipe, +/-1C precision)
- Electrostatic rotary bells: 60,000 RPM, 100kV cascade, 15-50mm bell cups
- Vision-based part recognition and skip-station interlocks
- Remote diagnostics via PROFINET/Ethernet dual-redundant network
- IATF 16949 compliant quality control with batch traceability

## Market Experience

- 30+ cities covered across major industrial regions
- Project scale: 1 to 169 robots per project
- 60%+ automotive OEM focus, 40% industrial & parts suppliers
- Project types: 60% new builds, 33% modifications, 7% expansions
- 1,000+ robots deployed across 45+ vehicle painting projects

## Typical Delivery Process

1. Requirement Analysis (part geometry, volume, finish specs)
2. Concept Design (3D layout, robot selection, process definition)
3. Detail Engineering (electrical, mechanical, controls)
4. Manufacturing & Factory Testing
5. Installation & Commissioning
6. Training & Handover
- Typical deployment: 8-24 weeks after design approval

## Standards & Compliance

- CE marking, UL/NFPA, ATEX/IECEx certification
- IATF 16949 quality management
- ISO 13485 (medical device coating)
- AS9100D/NADCAP (aerospace)
- FDA 21 CFR Part 11 (medical)

## Contact

- Website: https://tdpaint.com
- Email: engineering@tdpaint.com
- Location: Shanghai, China
